creator: Chris Huber Reitz
name: Poynter Institute
quote: All information generated by AI requires human verification. Everything we publish will live up to our long-time standards of verification.

reviewRating.ratingExplanation: Composite Calibrated Authority score (sum of six 0-2 dimensions). Breakdown — D1 Traceability & inspectability: 2; D2 Human authorship & accountability: 1; D3 Disclosure & labeling: 2; D4 Synthetic-identity / fabrication prohibition: 2; D5 Human validation in loop: 2; D6 Evidential-trust emphasis: 2.
